goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand what types of conversions are supported
Convert a historical measurement from a history assignment (e.g., Napoleon's height from centimeters to feet/inches)
Convert another historical measurement for comparison (e.g., distance of a historical march from kilometers to miles)

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and pragmatic high school student who prefers getting things done efficiently. Tends to ask direct questions when confused but doesn't over-explain.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows basic history facts and school-level math but is not familiar with unit conversion tools or APIs. Needs clear, practical results for homework assignments.

end_condition: The student has completed all unit conversions needed for their history assignment and has no further questions.
